name: Bisque de Homard
desc: Classic lobster bisque with saffron cream, cognac, and hand-picked lobster pieces. A timeless French classic.

name: Foie Gras Poêlé
desc: Pan-seared duck foie gras with fig compote, brioche toast, and aged balsamic reduction.

name: Velouté de Champignons
desc: Wild mushroom velouté with truffle oil, crème fraîche, and crispy pancetta crumbs.

name: Boeuf Wellington
desc: Tender beef fillet wrapped in mushroom duxelles and golden puff pastry. A crown jewel of British-French cuisine.

name: Saint-Jacques Poêlées
desc: Pan-seared scallops with cauliflower purée, crispy capers, and champagne beurre blanc.

name: Magret de Canard
desc: Duck breast with cherry gastrique, confit potato gratin, and roasted seasonal vegetables.

name: Risotto aux Truffes
desc: Arborio rice with aged Parmigiano-Reggiano, shaved black truffle, and truffle oil from Périgord.

name: Fondant au Chocolat
desc: Dark chocolate fondant with salted caramel heart, vanilla bean ice cream, and gold leaf.

name: Crème Brûlée
desc: Classic Madagascan vanilla custard with caramelised sugar crust and fresh berries.

name: Tarte Tatin
desc: Upside-down caramelised apple tart with Calvados cream and house-made vanilla ice cream.

name: Champagne Rosé
desc: Billecart-Salmon Brut Rosé — delicate notes of red fruit, fresh and elegant.

name: Cocktail Noir
desc: Signature dark cocktail with aged rum, activated charcoal, lime, ginger, and house bitters.
